---
title: "probit_sandbox"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

set.seed(0)

# x <- rnorm(100)
# y <- rbinom(100, 1, 0.5)

x_true <- rnorm(100, 0.5, 0.3)
y <- as.numeric(x_true > 0.5)
x <- x_true + rnorm(length(x), sd = 0.2) # add some noise

df <- data.frame(x, y)

mdl_meBART <- meBART::pbart(df$x, df$y,
                     meas_error_sigma = matrix(0.2),
                     x_mu = matrix(0.5),
                     x_sigma = matrix(0.3))


mdl_BART <- BART::pbart(df$x, df$y)

```


```{r}


preds_BART <- predict(mdl_BART, data.frame(x))

preds_meBART <- predict(mdl_meBART, data.frame(x))


```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

df2 <- data.frame(x=x,
                  probs=preds_BART$prob.test.mean,
                  y = y,
                  z=preds_BART$prob.test.mean>0.5)

ggplot(df2, aes(x = x, y = probs, color=z)) +
    geom_point() + 
    geom_point(aes(x=x, y=y)) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept=0.5) +
    labs(title = "BART Probit",
       x = "x",
       y = "y")


```



```{r}
library(ggplot2)

df2 <- data.frame(x=x,
                  probs=preds_meBART$prob.test.mean,
                  y = y,
                  z=preds_meBART$prob.test.mean>0.5)

ggplot(df2, aes(x = x, y = probs, color=z)) +
    geom_point() + 
    geom_point(aes(x=x, y=y)) + 
    geom_vline(xintercept=0.5) +
    labs(title = "meBART Probit",
       x = "x",
       y = "y")


```






```{r}

mdl <- mdl_meBART

x_draws <- mdl$x_draws[1,,]
x_draws_means <- rowMeans(x_draws)

df_me <- data.frame(X = x,
                    X_true= x_true)

df_me <- df_me[, c("X", "X_true")]

df_me$x_true_est <- x_draws_means

# 
# df <- data.frame(x_meas=x_meas, x_true = x_true, x_true_est = x_draws_means)

df <- df_me[order(df_me$X_true), ]
df$y <- 1:100

df2 <- reshape2::melt(df, id="y")

plot <- ggplot(df2) +
    geom_point(aes(x=value, y=y, color=variable), 
               shape=19, 
               size=2) + 
    theme(axis.text.y=element_blank(),
          axis.title.y=element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title=TeX("Estimation of True Value of $X_i$"), 
         x="X",
         color="Variable") +
    geom_segment(data=df, 
                 aes(x=X, xend=x_true_est, y=y, yend=y), 
                 arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.2,"cm"))) +
    # scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1), breaks = seq(-1.2, 1.2, 0.2)) +
    scale_color_discrete(labels = unname(TeX(c("Measured Value, $X_i^*$", "True Value, $X_i$", "Estimated True Value, $\\hat{X_i}$"))))


plot
```
